headline: AI stocks tumble, broad tech under pressure
detail: A second day of AI-driven selling is hitting the exact names concentrated in your book. When the AI trade unwinds, PLTR, AVGO, and CRWD all move in the same direction at once — margin means you feel it double.

headline: Micron drops 5% premarket in chip rout
detail: Micron is a bellwether for the semiconductor space. A 5% premarket drop signals chip sentiment is deteriorating, which is a direct headwind for AVGO and SMH — two of your largest exposures.

headline: OpenAI IPO delay complicates tech outlook
detail: An IPO delay from the highest-profile AI company signals cooling appetite for AI growth stories at current valuations. This undercuts the narrative holding up names like PLTR and AVGO, adding fundamental pressure on top of the technical damage already in your book.

headline: U.S. crude falls below $70, cargo ship attacked near Oman
detail: Oil weakness and renewed shipping risk near Oman could rattle broader risk appetite. Not a direct hit to your holdings, but risk-off macro moves tend to accelerate selling in high-beta tech and leveraged positions like SPAL.
